title: 360 Recruitment Consultant (Business Development)
description:
Key Responsibilities

Recruitment (360 Role)

  • End to end recruitment for IT & Non IT Clients
  • Responsible for business development, focusing on Semi Conductor, healthcare & life science sector.
  • Develop and maintain relationships with new and existing clients to understand their recruitment needs.
  • Developing and demonstrating strong market knowledge – staying informed about key industry developments and growth areas.
  • Conduct detailed screening, candidate evaluation, and shortlist submissions
  • Manage interviews, feedback loops, negotiations, and successful closures
  • Act as the primary recruitment partner for assigned clients
  • Build deep, consultative relationships with hiring managers and HR stakeholders
  • Provide market intelligence, hiring insights, and advisory on talent strategies
  • Support business development conversations alongside account managers when needed
  • Conduct talent mapping for niche or hard-to-fill roles
  • Stay updated on market trends, sector hiring patterns, and competitor insights

Requirements:

  • Minimum 6 years of experience in agency recruitment or executive search.
  • Minimum of Bachelors degree in business administration or similar relevant education background.
  • Proven track record in permanent & contract placements and handling 360 recruitment.
  • Experience in client mapping and generating leads.
  • Strong client-facing capability with experience managing hiring managers and HR stakeholders
  • Excellent communication, negotiation, and relationship-building skills.
  • Work in a KPI driven model to achieve set targets by the organization.
  • Ability to thrive in a fast-paced, target-driven environment.
  • Passion for delivering high-quality talent advisory and client experience.

postedCompany.description:
Tangspac Consulting is an award-winning professional staffing firm with a 20-year footprint in Asia and headquarters in Singapore dating back to 1993. It offers bespoke contingency search and professional services across various Finance & Technology sectors. 

Our team of consultants has unparalleled expertise and track-record in serving both buy-side and sell-side firms, including the largest names on Wall Street. We have successfully placed thousands of banking professionals across various business & technology verticals. Clients range from Corporate & Investment Banks, Asset Managers, Custodians, Trusts, Private Banks, to other Publicly Traded Companies.
 

Tangspac is a founding member of The Association of Professional Staffing Companies (APSCo) Asia, which is a trade body originally established in the UK that maintains close relationships with key government departments and agencies on behalf of the professional staffing industry.
postedCompany.name: TANGSPAC CONSULTING PTE LTD

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
